name: Lamb Hash and Poached Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a small saucepan over medium heat. Add the celery and onion and cook, stirring often, for 5 minutes.
2. Sprinkle with flour and cook, stirring constantly, another minute. Remove from heat and scrape mixture into a mixing bowl to cool.
3. Add the lamb. Wash the potatoes but don't peel them. Shred on the shredding blade of a food processor or coarsely grate by hand.
4. Add the shredded potatoes to the bowl and mix well. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
5. Melt 1 teaspoon butter in a 6-inch non-stick frying pan over medium heat. Add about 3/4- to 1 cup of the hash mixture, or about a 2-inch thickness.
6. Cook without stirring for 3 minutes. Flip the hash, which will have formed into a patty. Reduce heat to low and continue cooking another 5 minutes.
7. Repeat with the remaining mixture. As each hash patty is done, transfer to the oven and keep warm.
8. To serve, place 2 poached eggs on each serving.
